---
title: "Owen Browne Carter"
---

## Owen Browne Carter

**Dates:** 1802/3-1859)

### Description

architect

### Biography

Carter was employed to draw plans for the church of St. Matthew Otterbourne, though CMY always maintained that her father did most of the work.  He was a Winchester architect, and worked on the restoration of the cathedral.  In 1856 he was accused, but acquitted, of forgery.  His obituary speaks darkly of eccentricities and a death in poverty.  [<i>Hampshire Advertiser</i> (9 February 1856) 6; <i>Salisbury Guardian</i> (2 April 1859) 4.]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 15th 1869

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
